title: Windows NTLM Authentication Failure Spike
description: Detects repeated NTLM validation failures through Event ID 4776, including bad password, bad username, disabled account, expired account, and lockout codes.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '4776' and (Status in ('0xC0000064', '0xC000006A', '0xC000006D', '0xC0000072', '0xC0000193', '0xC0000234') or 'Failure Reason' in ('0xC0000064', '0xC000006A', '0xC000006D', '0xC0000072', '0xC0000193', '0xC0000234') or msg like '*Error Code*') | stats count as Failures, distinctcount('Source Address') as UniqueSources by 'Target User Name', 'Source Address', 'Host Name (Server)' | where Failures > 3 | sort -Failures
falsepositives: Legacy applications retrying stored NTLM credentials

references.name: Microsoft Learn: 4776(S,F) The computer attempted to validate credentials
